The Labyrinthauros moves through a space occupied by Philoctera, triggering the Tumble ability on her

card. She passes the Tumble roll and does not suffer Crash! Later in the same Primordial Round, the monster moves through her space one more time! Since Tumble has no cost and is a passive ability, she will then attempt to avoid Crash again.
